markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthxAI's content creation services for Turing's marketing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Initial Focus on Editorial:** GrowthxAI's core service is organic editorial content. The paid media use case is likely out of scope, but Tyler will confirm with CEO Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [**Two-Phase Engagement:** A mandatory 8-week Strategy Sprint (est. $15k) defines the content engine. This is followed by Growth Execution, where additional workstreams (e.g., newsletters) can be added for $9-15k each.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Turing's Initial Priority:** The Turing Intelligence (TI) and TI Talent business units, as they have the clearest organic growth path and budget. The Talent audience is a high-need area but lacks budget.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2604.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** A follow-up meeting is scheduled to define specific content use cases, with a target start date of January 1, 2026, to align with Turing's budget cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)

## Topics

### Turing's Content Challenges & Needs

  - [**Current AI Use:** Manual, task-specific GPT use for revisions and derivative pages; no automated workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Strategic Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Competitive analysis & foundational research for content briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategy to capture AI search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Repurposing & Distribution:** High interest in repurposing long-form content (e.g., research reports) into social posts, newsletters, and FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [**Design Support:** Need for design help (e.g., infographics) to offload work from a small internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [**Gated Content:** Interest in creating gated assets for demand generation, separate from organic content.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)

### GrowthxAI's Solution & Process

  - [**Core Offering:** An end-to-end partner providing an internal platform and expert team for scalable, quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Process Overview:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, est. $15k)**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [Defines ICP, brand voice, and custom AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [Ingests Turing's resources to build a custom knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [Publishes 5-10 articles to establish the quality bar.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [Turing can opt out after this phase.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
          - [Scales to daily publishing based on the roadmap from Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
          - [Additional workstreams (e.g., newsletters) can be added for $9-15k each.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Content Creation Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**Brief Generation:** Agentic workflow analyzes SERP, competitors, and search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Deep Research:** Uses tools like EXA/TAP and a custom researcher; loops until a quality threshold is met.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [**Drafting:** Generates content, adds cross-links, and validates against guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** Verifies every passage against sources; suggests rewrites if confidence is low.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Human Oversight:** Experts are in the loop for edits and to guide the AI with instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

### Turing's Audience & Prioritization

  - [**Four Distinct Audiences:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2604.0)
    1.  [**Turing Intelligence (TI):** Enterprises using deployed AI.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
    2.  [**TI Talent:** Scaling businesses using staff augmentation.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
    3.  [**TA2:** AI researchers and labs.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
    4.  [**Talent Audience:** Developers seeking work.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
  - [**Initial Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2604.0)
      - [**TI & TI Talent:** Highest priority due to clear organic growth paths and budget. The core team for this is Tara and Nathan.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2733.0)
      - [**TA2:** Lower priority; the audience is highly technical and small.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2733.0)
      - [**Talent Audience:** High need (neglected content since 2022) but low budget appetite for organic growth ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
      - [Review the Turing use case document.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
      - [Confirm with Marcel the scope for paid media and gated content.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [Share GrowthxAI resources with the Turing team.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3263.0)
  - [**Tara & Nathan:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)
      - [Share 3–5 examples of "great" internal content and competitor content.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)
      - [Refine and prioritize specific content use cases for the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
      - [Schedule a 30-min follow-up to define content use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
      - [Schedule a subsequent meeting with Marcel (GrowthxAI CEO) and Maya (Turing budget owner) to discuss scoping and pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/oairk3HdBGUZ2Mpyxzp3bXa5XJ3Xn77h?tab=summary&timestamp=3183.0)
